abilities.name: Deranged Transformation
abilities.flavor: Wielding the power of their curse, the abhorrant causes the limbs of a nearby pack to bulge and lengthen, allowing the creatures to charge forwards at a furious pace.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic and add 1 to wound rolls for its attacks.

abilities.name: Deranged Transformation
abilities.flavor: Wielding the power of their curse, the abhorrant causes the limbs of a nearby pack to bulge and lengthen, allowing the creatures to charge forwards at a furious pace.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic and add 1 to wound rolls for its attacks.

abilities.name: Royal Bodyguard
abilities.flavor: In battle, it falls to the tenacious Cryptguard to form a half-living shield for their vampiric overlords.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to ward rolls for friendly HEROES that are wholly within this unit’s combat range .

abilities.name: Royal Bodyguard
abilities.flavor: In battle, it falls to the tenacious Cryptguard to form a half-living shield for their vampiric overlords.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to ward rolls for friendly HEROES that are wholly within this unit’s combat range .

abilities.name: Predator's Pounce
abilities.flavor: Though they lack the power of true flight, Nightshriekers can leap clean over obstacles and the heads of the foe, allowing Morbheg Knights to strike and disengage at will.
abilities.effect: This unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit when it uses RETREAT abilities.

abilities.name: Predator's Pounce
abilities.flavor: Though they lack the power of true flight, Nightshriekers can leap clean over obstacles and the heads of the foe, allowing Morbheg Knights to strike and disengage at will.
abilities.effect: This unit can use CHARGE abilities even if it used a RETREAT ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit when it uses RETREAT abilities.

abilities.name: Victory Feast
abilities.flavor: A Varghulf rampages through the enemy’s ranks at will, its wounds sealing with unholy rapidity as it guzzles the flesh of the savaged foe.
abilities.effect: If any models were slain by this unit this turn, Heal (D6) this unit, and this unit can immediately use the ‘ Retreat ’ ability without any mortal damage being inflicted on it.

battleTraits.name: Noble Deeds
battleTraits.summary: Each time a friendly HERO uses a FIGHT ability , after its attacks have been resolved, give that HERO a number of noble deeds points equal to the number of damage points allocated by that ability
battleTraits.effect: Each time a friendly HERO uses a FIGHT ability , after its attacks have been resolved, give that HERO a number of noble deeds points equal to the number of damage points allocated by that ability. Each HERO can have a maximum of 6 noble deeds points at any time.

battleTraits.name: Feeding Frenzy
battleTraits.summary: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly HEROES that have 6 noble deeds points
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of any friendly HEROES that have 6 noble deeds points .
